problem id: e80d8872
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(2)

examples:
  10001011 -> 00010111
  11000110 -> 10000101
  01001001 -> 01111111
  00001010 -> 11010010
  10100110 -> 00110101
  01110010 -> 00001110
  10011100 -> 11000001
  11000100 -> 10001101

query: 11100010
predicted answer: 00000111
